entity.summary: Community-driven cross-chain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange and DeFi platform providing token swaps, farming, staking, lending, voting, and bridge access across Moonriver and CLV/Clover environments.
entity.notes: Current first-party Huckleberry website exposes Swap, Farm, Stake, Lend, Vote, Bridge, and Launch App navigation and describes the project as a community DEX and lending platform on Moonriver and Clover. DefiLlama independently reports current TVL and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: Huckleberry official DEX platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party site exposes Swap, Farm, Stake, Lend, Vote, Bridge, and Launch App surfaces and identifies Huckleberry as a community DEX and lending platform on Moonriver and Clover.

evidence.title: Huckleberry AMM metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Huckleberry as a cross-chain AMM DEX and reports current TVL, current staking value, fees, and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: Huckleberry AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Huckleberry AMM across Moonriver and CLV/Clover environments.
